name: Kohlrabi Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the tough outer skin from the kohlrabi.
2. Coarsely grate the bulbs.
3. Heat butter and olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Add garlic and onion to the skillet, stirring until fragrant.
5. Add grated kohlrabi to the skillet and sauté for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the kohlrabi is tender crisp.
6. Stir in lemon juice and parsley, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Remove the skillet from heat and stir in sour cream.
8. Serve hot.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
